findings.evidence: `Connected.lean:58` is `eq_of_apply_eq hp φ ψ (Subtype.ext_iff.mp h)`; the named API exists at `Fiber.lean:130-133`, `lemma fiber_smul_coe ... : (φ • e : E) = φ.1 e.1 := rfl`.
findings.fix: Use the explicit coercion lemma, e.g. take `congrArg Subtype.val h` and finish with `simpa only [fiber_smul_coe]`, so the proof does not depend on the action wrapper's definitional shape.
findings.issue: `eq_of_fiber_smul_eq_fiber_smul` closes with `Subtype.ext_iff.mp h`, which only has the needed type because the fibre `MulAction` currently unfolds to `fiberHomeomorphHom` and then to the underlying deck homeomorphism.

summary: One proof relies on the definitional implementation of the fibre action instead of the explicit API already provided for that coercion.
